features: Festival Braids - Quick and Easy Styling: Simply tie ombre colorful ponytail extensions directly onto your hair for an instant transformation, saving you time and effort. These easily attach to your hair and can be added to space buns, one high pony, or two lower pig tail. If you want to add length and more volume, we recommend 2-3 packs. Length: 22 inch, Weight: 50g/1.8 oz.

Easy to Wear and Braid: Attached to a sturdy hair tie, our synthetic hair extensions are incredibly easy to use. Simply tie your hair into a high or low ponytail, wrap the hair tie around it, and plait or braid into your own hair, pigtails, bubble braids.

No Damage to Your Hair - Glamorous new look without damaging your own hair. Say goodbye to expensive and time-consuming salon appointments, You can bring the festival bubble braids in or out anytime you want.

Suitable for All Ages - Perfect for women, girls and ladies. This colored hair extensions makes a perfect crazy hair day accessory for EDC festival, music festivals, raves, themed party, concert, school event, crazy hair days, dress up day, costumes, cosplay, and other fun events. And also a great gift for your daughter, friends and families.

Handmade Designs，Unique and Blinged Out: Each hair ponytail extension is crafted with synthetic hair and features handmade designs, making them different.Due to shooting lights and color differences of different monitors, there may be some slight color difference between the image and the actual ponytail. If you have any questions about hair color-matching questions, please contact us at any time.
description: Product description Colored Hair Extensions Directions How to wear, style and care for the hair extension: simply tie the hair extension to your hair for an instant transformation. Tie your hair into a high or low ponytail, wrap the headband around it and braid it into your own hair, braids or bubble braids. You can plug and unplug the hair extension anytime you want. Safety Warning keep away from fire See more
